Chronology of every recorded fact about [[General Teach]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 16''' — General Teach is a military leader who uses a Windwatcher.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 20''' — General Teach is searching for Calder and Kerian.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 28''' — General Teach has red-and-black-plated arms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 28''' — General Teach possesses hostile Intent.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 16''' — General Teach is someone the Emperor cannot trust with certain details.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 4''' — General Teach is a figure in black-and-red armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 6''' — General Teach is wading through the crowd.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 6''' — General Teach is a woman who uses the sword Tyrfang.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 10''' — General Teach carries the weapon Tyrfang.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 12''' — General Teach predicted the sky would crack in two or three days.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 18''' — General Teach is a military leader.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 20''' — General Teach allowed Calder to lead the assault on the Gray Island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 20''' — General Teach is an armored woman who trails dark power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 24''' — General Teach was wounded and in dire condition.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 16''' — Shera spent time with General Teach.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 1''' — General Teach is a woman in polished black-and-red armor who served the true Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 2''' — General Teach is a military leader with pale hair cut close to her scalp.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 2''' — General Teach can be reached via a chain of signals using whistles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 4''' — General Teach is the Head of the Imperial Guard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — General Teach is an officer waiting at Calder's right hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — General Teach is fighting against Estyr Six.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 11''' — General Teach is currently sleeping.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 13''' — General Teach is someone Calder wishes would be at his side.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 13''' — General Teach uses a specific padlock.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — General Teach joined the battle.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — General Teach was slammed into the ground by an invisible force.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 21''' — General Teach is a figure Shera is used to being in the presence of.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 24''' — General Teach wears red-and-black armor and carries Tyrfang.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 24''' — General Teach is a Guard.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
